query:
ALTER TABLE payments 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paidAmount DECIMAL(15,2) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastReminderSent TIMESTAMP NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS daysOverdue INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS periodCovered VARCHAR(100) NULL;
